generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a former NATO strategic planner, I've seen firsthand how our alliances keep America safe. Critics say we're overcommitting, but the reality is our partners share the burden more than you'd think. Did you know 14 of our 30 allies meet the 2% defense spending target? That's progress. We can't afford to go it alone - our security depends on these partnerships. #StrongAlliances #NationalSecurity
